testsuite.name: ValidationApiTest

testcase.name: testFailedLogin

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. JSON path data.email doesn't match. Expected: wrongemail@example.com Actual: null

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. JSON path data.email doesn't match. Expected: wrongemail@example.com Actual: null
